top_signals.title: Bund Yields Hit 15-Year High as $100 Oil Fans Inflation Concerns
top_signals.summary: German bond yields rose to the highest level since 2011 as surging oil prices prompted bigger bets on interest-rate hikes, even as the European Central Bank kept its benchmark unchanged.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Nasdaq 100 Eyes Worst Day in Month as Oil Prices Soar Over $100
top_signals.summary: The Nasdaq 100 Index tumbled, putting it on track for its worst day in a month, as doubts about the payoffs from debt-fueled artificial-intelligence spending boom dragged down big tech stocks. Oil prices pushed over $100 a barrel and bond yields rose as President Donald Trump threatened to escalate attacks in the Middle East.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The SEC settles with Coinbase over its missing Gary Gensler texts
